direction: pass cached side-normal trig values into KLAS3 and KLAS6 on the ratio-reg branch
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already loads sides.COSF[idx] and sides.SINF[idx] into COSJ and SINJ for every side, but the KLAS3 and KLAS6 boundary helpers reload the same immutable side-normal values. Passing the cached registers through BOUNDA removes redundant geometry loads while preserving all flux arithmetic operands and order.
